responseMessageContents.text:
The user is saying "Verified this task now" — meaning they've verified the completed work. The reels sync task is complete and verified by the user. 

This is a confirmation/verification message. The user is confirming they verified the reels task. I should acknowledge briefly and ask what they'd like next, since the summary lists several remaining next steps (PITR confirmation, off-site backups, APK build, etc.).

This is purely conversational — no tools needed.

Great — reels sync verified. The full-screen vertical feed, action rail, deal metrics, and CTAs are live on both `api.ivxholding.com` and `chat.ivxholding.com`.

Remaining items from the roadmap if you want to tackle any next:

1. **PITR confirmation** — check Supabase Dashboard → Database → Backups to confirm point-in-time recovery is active
2. **Off-site AWS S3 backup bucket** — needs your separate AWS credentials for cross-account storage
3. **Immutable backup storage** — enable object lock on the off-site bucket
4. **Data Recovery Center screen test** — navigate to `/admin/data-recovery` on device
5. **APK build** — via EAS Build or a real computer (sandbox OOM kills Gradle)

Which one would you like to work on?

responseMessageContents.title: Updated the video reels to match the website and improved login security.
responseMessageContents.description: We have redesigned the video reels to look like the main landing page and updated the login process so that the owner must sign in manually for better security. We also performed a full check to ensure everything is working correctly and is now live.
